Thank you for reaching out. This template is for the person whose session data was leaked via OpenCode Zen on or around April 2, 2026, resulting in the generation of a website for a project named "NEXUS ROOT LAB".

Please fill in as much or as little as you are comfortable sharing. You are not obligated to identify yourself beyond what you choose to disclose.

---

**Can you confirm this was your project?**

Describe anything that confirms the leaked payload was from your session (e.g. recognising the design specs, directory structure, or content described in the incident report). You do not need to share anything sensitive here.

*Your privacy matters. If you would prefer to communicate privately, please indicate that here and we will find a way to do so.*
